SOURCE: 83816738.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (83816738.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced software developer with a strong background in Java, Spring Framework, and Agile methodologies. Skilled in automation testing using Selenium and Cucumber, as well as developing RESTful web services and mobile applications.
SKILLS: Java/J2EE, JavaScript, Android, HTML, CSS, SQL, C, C++, Spring Framework, Hibernate, AngularJS, ReactJS, jQuery, Bootstrap, Selenium WebDriver, Cucumber, RESTful Web Services, Microservices, Single Page Application (SPA), Client/Server Architecture, Agile Methodologies (Scrum, Waterfall), Version Control Tools (SVN, Git), Build Tools (Ant, Maven, Gradle), Continuous Integration (Jenkins), Object-Oriented Programming, Test-Driven Development (TDD), Clean Coding, Continuous Delivery, Multi-platform Mobile Application Development (PhoneGap, Titanium)
